description: Let the discoveries begin with our low mile 2018 Jeep Cherokee Latitude, which stands out with a distinctive Red design. Powered by an energetic 2.4 Liter 4 Cylinder offering 184hp paired to a 9 Speed Automatic transmission for eager performance. Engineered for easy travel over tough terrain, this Front Wheel Drive SUV also achieves nearly 30mpg on the highway with good looks that can get attention anywhere. Check out the LED lighting, fog lamps, bright roof rails, and bold alloy wheels. The result is a modern appearance that's still pure Jeep!    Inside, you'll see that the Latitude cabin has a driver-friendly layout with firmly bolstered cloth front seats, a tilt-and-telescoping steering wheel, an air-filtration system, and a Uconnect® 3 infotainment system. That way, you'll benefit from the convenience of a 5-inch LCD screen with a backup camera, a six-speaker sound system, USB/auxiliary connectivity, an SD card slot, and a 12-volt power outlet. Set your course for adventure, and our Cherokee will lead the way!   With Jeep, you can be confident that you're protected by a high-strength steel frame, ABS, stability/traction control, hill-start assist, and an array of 10 airbags that include supplemental side coverage for all outboard passengers. This winning combination of capability, comfort, and style is waiting for you in our Cherokee Latitude! Save this Page and Call for Availability. description: The 2018 Mercedes-Benz GLS 450 4MATIC Sport Utility 4D is a full-size luxury SUV that combines Mercedes-Benz's signature elegance with powerful performance, advanced technology, and exceptional comfort. This three-row SUV is designed for families and individuals who desire both luxury and practicality in their everyday and long-distance driving experiences. Here's a detailed description:Exterior:Design: The 2018 GLS 450 features a bold and refined exterior, highlighted by its large, prominent grille with the iconic Mercedes-Benz star emblem. Its sleek, flowing lines and muscular stance give the SUV a commanding presence on the road.Dimensions: The GLS 450 is large and imposing, offering ample space for passengers and cargo while maintaining an aerodynamic silhouette for better performance and fuel efficiency.Wheels: The GLS 450 typically comes with 19-inch five-spoke alloy wheels, though larger wheels are available as an option, enhancing the vehicle's sporty appearance.Lighting: The SUV features full LED headlights, taillights, and daytime running lights, which not only contribute to its sophisticated look but also improve nighttime visibility. It also includes Mercedes' signature LED lighting design, adding a touch of luxury.Interior:Seating Capacity: The GLS 450 offers seating for up to seven passengers with its standard three-row configuration. The second-row seats slide and recline for added comfort, while the third row can fold flat for increased cargo space.Materials: The cabin is outfitted with high-quality materials, including leather upholstery, wood trim, and soft-touch surfaces, creating a luxurious environment.Comfort: The front seats are power-adjustable and heated, offering lumbar support for enhanced comfort. Optional ventilated front seats and heated second-row seats are available for added convenience. The tri-zone automatic climate control allows passengers in different rows to set their own temperature preferences.Technology: The GLS 450 is equipped with the COMAND infotainment system, which includes an 8-inch display, navigation, Bluetooth, and smartphone integration via Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. A Harman Kardon premium sound system is standard.Cargo Space: The GLS 450 provides a spacious interior with up to 93.8 cubic feet of cargo space with the second and third rows folded flat. This makes it ideal for long trips or hauling large items.Performance:Engine: The 2018 GLS 450 is powered by a 3.0-liter biturbo V6 engine that produces 362 horsepower and 369 lb-ft of torque. This engine provides strong acceleration and smooth power delivery, making the SUV capable of handling both city driving and highway cruising with ease.Transmission: It is paired with a 9-speed automatic transmission, which delivers smooth and precise shifts, enhancing both performance and fuel efficiency.Drivetrain: The GLS 450 comes standard with Mercedes' 4MATIC all-wheel-drive system, which ensures optimal traction and stability in various road conditions, including snow, rain, and off-road terrain.Fuel Economy: The SUV offers reasonable fuel efficiency for its size and power, with EPA estimates of around 17 mpg city and 22 mpg highway.Towing Capacity: The GLS 450 has a maximum towing capacity of up to 7,500 pound, making it suitable for towing boats, trailers, or recreational vehicles.Safety:Features: Mercedes-Benz is known for its advanced safety technology, and the GLS 450 is no exception. Standard safety features include:Collision Prevention Assist PlusAttention Assist (driver drowsiness monitoring)Crosswind AssistActive Brake AssistBlind Spot Assist and Lane Keeping AssistA rearview camera with available 360-degree camera viewOptional Safety Features: Adaptive cruise control with steering assist, automatic emergency braking, and other driver assistance technologies are available in the Driver Assistance Package.Crash Ratings: The GLS 450 has earned high safety ratings, making it a secure choice for families.Overall Experience:The 2018 Mercedes-Benz GLS 450 4MATIC Sport Utility 4D is a top-tier luxury SUV that offers a blend of elegance, powerful performance, advanced technology, and supreme comfort. Its spacious three-row interior makes it ideal for families, while its robust engine and off-road capabilities make it versatile enough for adventure-seeking drivers. Whether for daily commuting or long-distance trips, the GLS 450 provides a premium driving experience that combines practicality and indulgence.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Keyless Entry,AM/FM/HD Radio,Surround View Camera,Navigation System,Power Door Locks,Appearance Pkg,Power Liftgate Release,Premium Wheels,Backup Camera,Blind-Spot Assist,Bluetooth Wireless,Dual Air Bags,KEYLESS-GO,Power Third Row,F&R Side Air Bags,Knee Air Bags,LED Headlamps,AWD,Heated Seats,harman/kardon Sound,Hill Start Assist Control,Electronic Stability Control,Auto 9-Spd 9G-Tronic,Parking Sensors,Towing Pkg,ABS (4-Wheel),Dual Power Seats,F&R Head Curtain Air Bags,Traction Control,Ventilated Seats,Alarm System,Daytime Running Lights,V6 Twin Turbo 3.0L,Running Boards,COMAND,Lane Keeping Assist,Premium 1 Pkg,Bang & Olufsen Sound,designo Nappa Leather,Park Assist Pilot,SiriusXM Satellite,Power Windows,Air Conditioning,DVD System,Air Conditioning Rear,Panorama Roof,Tilt & Telescoping Wheel,mbrace

description: Discover the perfect blend of style, capability, and technology in this 2023 Toyota RAV4 XLE. With its sleek black exterior, this SUV is not only visually striking but also packed with an impressive array of features that cater to your every need.  Elevate your driving experience with our standout highlights:   Android Auto  Apple CarPlay  Backup Camera  Bluetooth  Carfax 1-Owner  This Toyota RAV4 XLE is more than just a practical SUV; it's a testament to Toyota's commitment to quality and innovation. Powered by a 2.5L 4-Cylinder DOHC Dual VVT-i engine and an 8-Speed Automatic transmission, this vehicle delivers an exceptional balance of performance and efficiency, boasting an impressive 27 city and 34 highway MPG.  Indulge in the peace of mind that comes with our Toyota Certified Pre-Owned program. This RAV4 has undergone a rigorous 160-point inspection, ensuring it meets the highest standards of quality and reliability. With a 12-month/12,000-mile limited comprehensive warranty, a powertrain warranty that extends up to 84 months/100,000 miles, and 7 years/100,000 miles of roadside assistance, you can drive with confidence knowing that your investment is protected.  Step inside and experience the comfort and convenience of this well-equipped RAV4 XLE. Enjoy features like automatic climate control, a power driver's seat, and a premium audio system with SiriusXM capabilities. The spacious and versatile interior, combined with the SUV's impressive cargo capacity, makes this the perfect companion for your family adventures, weekend getaways, and everyday commutes. This 2011 BMW is a stylish white sport utility vehicle that stands out with its sleek look and powerful 4.8L V8 engine. It comes with an all-wheel-drive system, making it reliable in various weather conditions. The black leather interior adds a touch of luxury, while the genuine wood trim and leather steering wheel provide a comfortable driving experience. There's plenty of room for passengers and cargo, with second-row folding seats and cargo area tiedowns.  Driving this BMW feels smooth and secure, thanks to features like traction control, stability control, and ABS brakes. Enjoy peace of mind with advanced safety features like Front Automatic Emergency Braking, Lane Keeping Assist, Blind Spot Monitoring, Rear Cross Traffic Alert, and a rearview camera system. The Edge also features remote keyless entry, push-button start, silver roof rails, LED headlights and fog lights, and a spacious interior with split-folding rear seats for extra cargo space. description: Prepare to be captivated by the sheer power and luxury of the 2014 Ram 3500 Laramie, a beast on wheels that effortlessly combines rugged capability with refined elegance. This commanding truck, with its bold black exterior, is not just a vehicle; it's a statement of strength and sophistication, ready to take on any challenge you throw its way.  Under the hood lies the heart of this powerhouse: the legendary HEMI 5.7L V8 engine, delivering a staggering 383 horsepower and 400 lb-ft of torque. This engine is not just about raw power; it's a testament to engineering excellence that ensures you have the muscle to tow, haul, and conquer any road with supreme confidence. Paired with a 6-Speed Shiftable Automatic transmission, the Ram 3500 Laramie offers the perfect blend of control and flexibility, allowing you to seamlessly adapt to any driving condition.  Step inside, and you'll be enveloped in a world of luxury. While the specific details of the leather interior remain a mystery, you can rest assured that Ram's commitment to quality and comfort is unparalleled. The Laramie trim is synonymous with premium materials and attention to detail, ensuring that every journey is a pleasure, whether you're cruising through the city or tackling rugged terrain.  This 2014 Ram 3500 Laramie isn't just about brawn and beauty; it's a proven performer, recognized by J.D. Power and Associates's Automotive Performance, Execution and Layout (APEAL) Study as a top model in its segment. This accolade speaks volumes about the truck's exceptional design, performance, and owner satisfaction, giving you the confidence that you're investing in a vehicle that's been celebrated for its excellence.  With 167,134 miles on the odometer, this Ram 3500 Laramie has proven its reliability and durability. It's a testament to the truck's robust construction and enduring performance, ready to continue serving you faithfully for many more miles to come.  Imagine the possibilities with this formidable truck at your command. Whether you're towing a trailer, hauling heavy loads, or simply enjoying the open road, the Ram 3500 Laramie is your trusted companion, offering unrivaled power and luxury in one remarkable package.  Don't miss your chance to own this exceptional vehicle that combines the best of both worlds: the rugged capability you need and the luxurious comfort you deserve. The 2015 Ram ProMaster 3500 159 WB Cargo is a versatile and dependable full-size commercial van, built to handle a wide range of business needs. With its spacious 159-inch wheelbase, this high-roof cargo van offers ample room for transporting tools, equipment, and inventory while maintaining a manageable footprint for urban driving. Designed with functionality in mind, it features a front-wheel-drive layout that enhances maneuverability and maximizes interior cargo space. The ProMaster 3500 delivers practical performance with strong payload and towing capacity, making it a solid choice for contractors, delivery services, or any company requiring reliable commercial transportation.----This particular model is equipped with several convenience and safety features that enhance both driver confidence and overall usability. A backup camera and parking sensors provide extra peace of mind when navigating tight spaces or crowded job sites. Bluetooth connectivity allows for hands-free phone use and audio streaming, keeping drivers connected without distraction. Keyless entry offers easy access, especially when hauling equipment or managing multiple stops. Additional safety is provided by side impact airbags, helping to protect occupants in the event of a collision. Fog lights ensure improved visibility in poor weather conditions, contributing to safer travel at all times. Overall, this 2015 Ram ProMaster 3500 delivers a practical blend of capability, technology, and comfort designed to meet the demands of today's busy work environments.

description: The 2013 BMW 5 Series 528i xDrive AWD 4dr Sedan with a 2.0L I4 turbocharged engine is a sophisticated blend of luxury, performance, and technology. Below is a detailed overview: 111K MILES Performance: Engine: The 2.0L inline-4 turbocharged engine produces 240 horsepower and 260 lb-ft of torque. This engine delivers excellent fuel efficiency while maintaining the performance BMW is known for. Transmission: An 8-speed automatic transmission with manual shift mode ensures smooth and responsive gear changes. All-Wheel Drive (xDrive): The xDrive system enhances traction and stability, making it ideal for various road conditions, including rain and snow. Acceleration: The 528i xDrive can go from 0 to 60 mph in approximately 6.4 seconds, providing an engaging driving experience. Fuel Economy: EPA estimates are 22 mpg city / 33 mpg highway, making it efficient for its class. Exterior Design: Dimensions: The 528i xDrive sedan measures 193.4 inches in length, 73.2 inches in width, and 57.6 inches in height, with a wheelbase of 116.9 inches. Styling: Classic BMW aesthetics with a kidney grille, sleek lines, and sculpted edges give it a timeless and elegant appearance. Lighting: Comes equipped with xenon headlights and LED daytime running lights for improved visibility. Wheels: 17-inch alloy wheels are standard, with optional larger wheels for enhanced style and performance. Color Options: A variety of factory paint colors, ranging from Alpine White to sophisticated metallic shades like Imperial Blue or Space Gray. Interior Comfort and Features: Seating: The cabin comfortably seats five passengers with leatherette upholstery (or optional Dakota leather)and 10-way power-adjustable front seats with memory settings. Materials: High-quality materials, including wood and aluminum trim, enhance the luxurious feel. Infotainment: Equipped with BMW's iDrive system, featuring a 10.2-inch display for navigation, audio, and vehicle settings. Bluetooth connectivity USB and AUX inputs HD Radio and optional premium sound system Climate Control: Dual-zone automatic climate control with rear air vents ensures passenger comfort. Cargo Space: Offers 14 cubic feet of trunk space, with fold-down rear seats for additional flexibility. Safety Features: Standard Safety Equipment: Dynamic Stability Control (DSC) and Traction Control (DTC) Anti-lock Braking System (ABS) with Cornering Brake Control (CBC) Front and side airbags with a curtain airbag system Driver Assistance Features: Rearview camera Parking sensors Optional features include a head-up display, lane departure warning, and blind-spot detection. Driving Dynamics: The 2013 528i xDrive is lauded for its balanced ride quality. The finely tuned suspension absorbs road imperfections while delivering precise handling. The xDrive system dynamically adjusts power between the front and rear wheels for better cornering and road grip. Pricing and Value: Original MSRP: Approximately $49,000, with additional costs for optional features and packages. Resale Value: Strong for its class, thanks to its reputation for luxury and engineering. Conclusion: The 2013 BMW 528i xDrive is a versatile luxury sedan that combines refined styling, dynamic performance, and modern technology. It's an excellent choice for those seeking a premium driving experience with the added confidence of all-wheel drive. description: Your Luxury Car Dealership in Dallas, TX When you buy luxury, you should go to dealership that directly deals with luxury brands and at OttoSource, that is what we do. We specialize in late model luxury vehicles, from BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Lexus, Land Rover, Porsche and many more. Get the dream car that you've always wanted and if we don't have the vehicle you want in our inventory then we will work hard to find one for you. OttoSource is the place to go when looking for a quality pre-owned luxury vehicle in the Dallas area. We offer some of the best deals in the area and we make it possible for you to be driving your dream car. When it comes to luxury vehicles, customers are willing to come from all over to get the vehicle of their dreams. OttoSource offers free airport pickup and we ship across the entire country, so if you are unable to come to us we can make sure that your new vehicle arrives safely to you. We have customers come from all around to visit us in Dallas. We have customers come from Houston, Austin, San Antonio, Arlington, Plano and even Oklahoma City. If you live near the Dallas and surrounding areas then come to OttoSource for all your luxury vehicle needs. Excellence, luxury and stature are just a few of the pillars this car is built upon. Enjoy driving? Well now you will get more thrills behind the wheel thanks to the heightened performance of AWD. Better handling. Better traction. Better driving experience. This 2016 Porsche Panamera has such low mileage it has been parked more than driven. More information about the 2016 Porsche Panamera: The Panamera's front engine design may depart with traditional Porsche design, but its elongated shape provides comfortable seating for everyone--even for passengers over 6 feet tall. It features up to 45 cubic feet of cargo space with the rear seats folded. And, it wouldn't be a Porsche if it didn't out-handle and out-accelerate almost everything else on the road. Two hybrid models bring performance and green credibility, while the Turbo S could be the most powerful station wagon available. The base trim starts at around $78,000, but there is no other car available that looks, handles or hauls like a Panamera. description: 2017 Jeep Renegade Trailhawk 4x4 Trail-Rated Capability, Compact Versatility & Rugged Jeep Performance  The 2017 Jeep Renegade Trailhawk 4x4 delivers true Jeep Trail Rated capability in a compact SUV built for adventure. Powered by a responsive 2.4L I4 MultiAir engine paired with a 9-speed automatic transmission, this Renegade provides confident acceleration, smooth shifting, and efficient everyday performance. Equipped with Jeeps advanced Selec-Terrain system with Rock Mode, Hill Descent Control, skid plates, and tow hooks, the Trailhawk is engineered to handle mud, snow, gravel, and off-road terrain with confidence.  Inside, the cabin blends rugged durability with smart technology. Premium cloth low-back bucket seats, a 7-inch TFT color driver display, leather-wrapped steering wheel, and automatic climate control create a comfortable driving experience. The Uconnect 5.0 system with 5-inch touchscreen includes integrated voice command, Bluetooth connectivity, SiriusXM satellite radio, and steering wheel-mounted audio controls to keep you connected wherever the trail leads.  Safety and stability features include Electronic Stability Control, Electronic Roll Mitigation, advanced multistage front airbags, supplemental side-curtain airbags, ParkView rear backup camera, and all-speed traction control. The Renegade Trailhawks bold exterior styling features 17-inch aluminum wheels, all-season on/off-road tires, heated exterior mirrors, automatic headlamps, full-size spare tire, and distinctive Trailhawk badging. Finished in sleek Black exterior paint with body-color roof, this Renegade stands out while staying true to its off-road roots.  Compact in size but big on capability, the 2017 Jeep Renegade Trailhawk 4x4 is ideal for drivers who want authentic Jeep performance in an efficient and maneuverable SUV.
